visualizations.title: Cube Root & Cubing Relationship
visualizations.description: The mathematical link showing that cube root is the inverse operation of cubing.

steps.explanation: The cube root of x equals y (where the index 3 denotes cube root).
This means that y multiplied by itself twice (three factors total) equals x.

visualizations.title: The Volume to Edge-Length Link
visualizations.description: See how taking the cube root of a 3D volume stack isolates the length of a single edge.
